category: Improper Control of a Resource Through its Lifetime
description: Upgradeable contracts rely on stable storage slots. Reordering, removing, or inserting state variables (or changing inheritance order) between versions causes storage collisions when the proxy reuses the same slots, corrupting balances, roles, or configuration.
name: Storage Layout Collision on Upgrade
remediation: - Freeze variable ordering; only append new variables. - Reserve gaps (`uint256[50] private __gap;`) to allow future expansion. - Use automated storage layout diffing and follow upgrade-safe patterns (e.g., OZ Upgradeable tooling).
